title: Authentication System and Protected Routes
description: Implement complete user authentication flow using Supabase Auth including registration, login, logout, password reset, and session management. Create auth UI pages (sign-up, sign-in, forgot password). Implement protected route middleware/wrapper for App Router that redirects unauthenticated users. Set up auth state provider for client components. Create user profile record in database upon registration. Out of scope: OAuth providers, email verification flows beyond Supabase defaults.
